snippet: VSCode is becoming unusable on my M2 Mac. 8GB RAM eaten just by the editor. Something broke in recent releases and nobody seems to care. #vscode #devtools
author: fran.bsky.social

snippet: Switched back to Neovim after VSCode became too slow with my React project. The IntelliSense lag was unbearable — multiple seconds per suggestion.
author: grace.bsky.social
